subject: feat: add price trend indicators with auto-populated price history
body:
- price_history trigger: auto-inserts into price_history on every
  fuel_prices INSERT or UPDATE (migration 20260305000002)
- PriceTrend component: up/down/unchanged arrow with color coding
  (red=increase, green=decrease, gray=unchanged)
- Station detail: fetches previous prices from price_history and
  shows trend alongside each fuel price
- Share button added alongside Get Directions

Tags: features, prices, trends, migration
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: features
Semver: minor
